markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between N-able and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [N-able seeks to improve content creation efficiency, particularly for their cybersecurity solutions and MSP/IT Pro audience](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation, strategy, and publishing services, with a focus on SEO and organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential engagement would start with a 6-8 week sprint to define strategy and calibrate content, followed by ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [N-able team expressed interest but has concerns about internal prioritization and measuring content impact](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### N-able's Current Challenges and Goals

  - [Pivoting focus to cybersecurity solutions across endpoint, SOC, and backup](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Targeting ambitious revenue growth through 2028](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Need to improve top-of-funnel awareness and tell a comprehensive story](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Struggling to acquire new MSP customers for AdLumen product](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Desire to better promote COVE data protection product as an industry leader](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Expanding target audience to include internal IT departments (IT Pros)](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Approach

  - [Uses multiple AI tools and workflows to research, generate, and optimize content](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Focuses on creating high-quality answers to specific user questions and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Leverages tools like Scrunch to analyze AI search results and identify content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Aims for "compound effects" by repurposing content across multiple channels and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Typical output ranges from 5-15 articles per week, with potential for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution Process

  - [6-8 week initial sprint to define strategy, calibrate on voice/tone, and set content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Ongoing execution phase with daily publishing and continuous optimization](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [GrowthX team interfaces with technical experts, customers, and other stakeholders to deepen understanding](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Focus on creating unique content experiences beyond typical solution pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content creation for location, industry, or role-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Measurement and Impact

  - [N-able currently struggles with attribution and measuring content impact](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=2930.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide strategic guidance on improving measurement, but not hands-on implementation](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=2967.0)
  - [Focus on driving qualified leads and revenue, not just traffic](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
  - [Challenges in multi-touch attribution becoming more complex with AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=2841.0)

### Operational Considerations

  - [N-able team concerned about internal prioritization and resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3164.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to minimize burden on client team while maintaining necessary collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3210.0)
  - [Typical engagement starts at $12k/month for editorial content, can increase to $15-20k with programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3486.0)
  - [GrowthX can handle end-to-end content creation and publishing, including WordPress integration if needed](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share meeting recording and strategy document with N-able team](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3803.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a sample content piece based on N-able's business to demonstrate AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3759.0)
  - [N-able to review roles and responsibilities for potential engagement to assess feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3460.0)
  - [N-able to consider internal prioritization and resource allocation for potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3164.0)
  - [Further discussion on measurement strategies and potential integration with N-able's existing systems](https://fathom.video/share/gSJ5Pvieq7_1byuSrsvhuyazBqyzDWzz?tab=summary&timestamp=3460.0)
